assertions.title: Error events stay structured and non-fatal
assertions.reason: The exact assigned cargo probe exited 0 and printed `structured realtime error preserved message/code/param/event_id and same connection recovered with final text: Recovered`, confirming the probe observed a structured realtime error and then completed a later valid request on the same connection.

commands.observed: Probe completed successfully and reported preserved structured realtime error fields plus same-connection recovery with final text `Recovered`.

summary: VAL-REALTIME-006 passed: the exact mocked cargo probe preserved structured realtime error details and a subsequent valid request on the same connection completed successfully.
